title: Zelcraft
description: A simple RPG/Vanilla modpack with more quality then quantity
body:
![Zelcraft logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d50537d7a9ec56b3e92a64568c587d3e73a602d3_0.webp)

welcome to the world of Zelcraft

all on neoforge, 1.21.1 and above

this modpacks goal is focus on the highest quality, only the best of the best. this helps avoid a clutter of mods making it feel more like an actual game.

1.20.1 forge version: [https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/zelcraft]

Features:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- New bosses, all buffed to fit the modpack.
- visual upgrades
- new potion making system
- QOL improvements
- New and improved structures
- sound improvements
- improved farming and cooking mechanics
- included resource packs and shaders
- and more!

</details>

Known bugs:
<details>
<summary>Spoiler</summary>
  
- Alchimest Eye when equipped looks like a iron helmet, also even though its a necklace it doesnt go in the necklace slot

</details>
